data_description.use_single_tariff: Choose single tariff if your meter does not distinguish between day/night rates (no T1/T2 split).
data_description.tariff_enkel: The all-in rate per kWh electricity you pay, including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.tariff_normaal: The all-in rate per kWh electricity during peak hours (daytime, T1), including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.tariff_dal: The all-in rate per kWh electricity during off-peak hours (night/weekend, T2), including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.tariff_return: The compensation you receive per kWh of electricity returned to the grid, excluding VAT. Found on your energy contract or invoice.
data_description.tariff_return_cost: The costs you pay per kWh of electricity returned to the grid, including VAT. See your contract for return delivery costs.

data_description.fixed_delivery_day_electricity: Fixed delivery costs per day for electricity, regardless of your usage. Including VAT.
data_description.system_operator_day_electricity: Costs for connection to the electricity grid and transport per day, paid via your supplier on behalf of the grid operator. Including VAT.
data_description.energy_reduction_year: The energy tax reduction per day (negative amount, including VAT). Annual reduction ÷ 365. Every household receives this fixed discount.
data_description.gas_tariff: The all-in rate per m³ gas you pay, including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.fixed_delivery_day_gas: Fixed delivery costs per day for gas, regardless of your usage. Including VAT.
data_description.system_operator_day_gas: Costs for connection to the gas grid and transport per day, paid via your supplier on behalf of the grid operator. Including VAT.

data_description.use_single_tariff: Choose single tariff if your meter does not distinguish between day/night rates (no T1/T2 split).
data_description.tariff_enkel: The all-in rate per kWh electricity you pay, including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.tariff_normaal: The all-in rate per kWh electricity during peak hours (daytime, T1), including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.tariff_dal: The all-in rate per kWh electricity during off-peak hours (night/weekend, T2), including VAT. Consists of delivery rate + energy tax + VAT.
data_description.tariff_return: The compensation you receive per kWh of electricity returned to the grid, excluding VAT. Found on your energy contract or invoice.
data_description.tariff_return_cost: The costs you pay per kWh of electricity returned to the grid, including VAT. See your contract for return delivery costs.
